description_wiki: Kingston is the capital and largest city of Jamaica, located on the southeastern coast of the island.

description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.

Florida (  FLORR-ih-də; Spanish: [floˈɾiða] ) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic
regions of the United States.

description: city in Hillsborough County, Florida, United States
description_wiki: Plant City is an incorporated city in Hillsborough County, Florida, United States, approximately midway between Brandon and Lakeland along Interstate 4.

The West Indies are an island subregion of the Americas, surrounded by the North Atlantic Ocean and the Caribbean Sea, which comprises 13 independent island countries and 18 dependencies in three archipelagos: the Greater Antilles, the Lesser Antilles, and the Lucayan Archipelago.

description: United States federal government public work relief program part of the New Deal
description_wiki: The Civilian Conservation Corps (CCC) was a government work relief program that ran from 1933 to 1942 in the United States for unemployed, unmarried men ages 18–25 and eventually expanded to ages 17–28, who volunteered amid widespread unemployment.
Olustee is an unincorporated area in Baker County, Florida, United States.

description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.
